name: trading-framework
description: Modular web trading MVP foundation with Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Docker Compose.

scripts.dev: sh -c 'npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web & wait'
scripts.web-test: npm --workspace apps/web run lint && npm --workspace apps/web run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.test: npm run api-test && npm run web-test
scripts.lint:api: docker compose build api && docker run --rm trading-framework-api ruff check app tests
scripts.format:api: docker compose build api && docker run --rm trading-framework-api ruff format app tests
